basic_details.job_title: Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 09 July 2026 on the official website https://puchd.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced for the Guest Faculty post through the Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Guest Faculty: As per UGC norms

salary_details.details: Guest Faculty: Rs. 1500/- per lecture (max Rs. 50,000/- per month)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://puchd.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Overview
Panjab University Guest Faculty Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Panjab University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Panjab University Guest Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: http://puchd.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form is 27 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Panjab University has announced 2 vacancies for the post of Guest Faculty.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: Candidates must fulfill the UGC norms prescribed for the Guest Faculty position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Panjab University Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive ₹1,500 per lecture, subject to a maximum of ₹50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of an Interview followed by Document Verification.
